title: klasea centauroides subsp. cupuliformis
intro: Klasea centauroides subsp. cupuliformis, also known as Klasea cupuliformis, is a subspecies of plant in the family Boraginaceae. Klasea cupuliformis is a type of plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as respiratory problems, fever, and skin conditions, due to its potential health benefits. Klasea cupuliformis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal properties, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine in some parts of the world.
